styleEdit.dailyRitual: Point your toes directly towards your destination before taking the first step.
styleEdit.description: Subtlety is overrated when your outfit has a point to make so try sharp angles and defined shoulders to cut through any confusion. Look for clothing that creates a distinct V-shape or arrow-like form, creating a visual vector pointing exactly where you want to go. Directness is a brilliant style choice all on its own.
styleEdit.title: The Direct Approach
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe makes you feel the most assertive?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Point a finger decisively to practice giving direction.
styleEdit.description: Dress like you are calling the shots today by ensuring your silhouette is distinct; strong lines and a defined shape help you take up space. Ditch slouchy or vague fits in favour of intentional tailoring because you want to direct the eye exactly where it needs to go. You are the boss so dress like it.
styleEdit.title: The Director
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style command respect?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Set your gaze on the furthest point of the horizon before stepping out.
styleEdit.description: Let your outfit take on any strain the day may bring. A solid waistband or some supportive tailoring helps you stand tall even if you are just leaning against a wall checking your phone. Pick a highly visible silhouette that refuses to blend into the scenery and holds its own perfectly.
styleEdit.title: The Anticipation
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your posture match the quality of your outfit?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Clear a small space on your dresser or shelf to symbolically make room for the new.
styleEdit.description: New concepts need room to breathe so consider a palette cleanser of minimalism. A monochromatic base allows the shape of the garment to take centre stage without fighting some busy print for attention. Perhaps it is time to revisit that one stark, architectural piece you bought on a whim and barely wore, because simplicity is the ultimate flex when you know what you're doing.
styleEdit.title: The Idea
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What basic piece do you overlook despite its perfection?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Apply a scent to your pulse points to mark your own boundaries.
styleEdit.description: Choose an aesthetic that feels open rather than guarded today. Loosen the fit to let the air in. Focus on that easy, lived-in energy instead of pristine, untouchable perfection. You want a vibe that makes you feel the most comfortable in your own skin, while remaining totally in control of the situation.
styleEdit.title: The Exposure
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most vulnerable?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Name one thing you want to 'manifest' today. Let that intention be the final layer you put on.
styleEdit.description: Today is a good day to make the outfit count. Don’t just get dressed, cast yourself in the lead role. Look for things like structured shoulders or high-contrast lapels that frame the face and naturally draw the eye upwards. Craft a distinct persona using the clothes already in your wardrobe and dress like you’re about to pull a rabbit (or a promotion) out of a hat.
styleEdit.title: The Showman
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes speak for you before you’ve even said a word?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Adjust your collar and quickly scan the room from left to right.
styleEdit.description: Curiosity requires you to be quick on your feet today so keep your layers light and mobile. Opt for smooth, agile textures that allow you to pivot quickly. A high collar or structured neckline gives you somewhere to tuck your chin while you observe the room. You are basically gathering intel today so dress like the most stylish spy in the building.
styleEdit.title: The Observer
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to be seen or to see everything?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Move your arms in a wave motion to test the flow of your sleeves.
styleEdit.description: Move like water today by avoiding anything stiff or constricting in favour of fluid lines that drape around the body. Wide, flowing bottoms or oversized shirts allow you to flow through the day with grace. Emotional intelligence requires flexibility so ensure your clothes can keep up.
styleEdit.title: The Flow
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes allow you to move with grace?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Open your arms wide to welcome the energy of the day.
styleEdit.description: Today’s vibe is "Hostess with the Mostess" even if you are just hosting yourself. We want relaxed shapes that still look intentional, like a matching set that says you have your life together behind closed doors. Find the exact sweet spot between looking good enough for a surprise visitor and being comfortable enough to curl up on the sofa. You are the guest of honour today, so absolutely no stiff waistbands allowed.
styleEdit.title: The Homecoming
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Are you dressing for the life you actually live, or the one you are trying to project?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Spin in a slow circle to acknowledge your own completeness.
styleEdit.description: Build a cohesive, integrated look where every single element speaks seamlessly to the others. Layer textures that envelope the body in a continuous, unbroken line. Look for wrapping shapes and a tonal palette that locks the entire outfit together perfectly from head to toe.
styleEdit.title: The Complete Package
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit feel like a random collection of parts or a whole?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Put on your shoes before you have fully decided where you are going.
styleEdit.description: Trust your first instinct and grab the first thing that catches your eye. There is a cool energy in spontaneous styling that overthinking completely kills. Throw on that jacket you bought on a whim or the shoes you usually save for "later." Later is now, so ride that wave of impulsive energy and see where it takes you.
styleEdit.title: The Impulse
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the most impulsive fashion purchase you actually wear?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Adjust one detail of your outfit to make it unique to you.
styleEdit.description: Innovation requires a fresh look so style your wardrobe with a creative twist by using a scarf as a belt or wearing a jacket differently. Show that you can see potential where others see tradition. It is about vision and execution so make the old feel new again through sheer force of will.
styleEdit.title: The Entrepreneur
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: How can you innovate with what you already own? # Suit of Cups

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Polish a button or a piece of jewellery to ensure it shines for the arrival.
styleEdit.description: The vibe is "International Person of Mystery" even if you are just grabbing a coffee. Reach for the pieces that have a backstory, like that weird thrift find or the jacket you bought on a whim. Pair the eclectic stuff with your sensible basics to show you know exactly what you are doing. It is time to let your wardrobe show off a little.
styleEdit.title: The Export
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you value the pieces you already own?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Close your eyes and run your hands over your clothes to truly feel the texture.
styleEdit.description: Your gut instinct is your stylist today. Ignore the trends and reach for the item that emotionally calls to you even if it makes no logical sense. Mix textures based on how they feel rather than how they look. It is about sensory satisfaction and trusting that if it feels right it will look right.
styleEdit.title: The Intuition
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit acts as a mood ring for your emotions?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand with your feet perfectly parallel and centre your weight before walking out.
styleEdit.description: Commit to the bit and create a silhouette that connects effortlessly from top to bottom. Embrace the total look of a matching set or a single seamless piece like a boiler suit. There is undeniable power in total cohesion, so let one major aesthetic decision do the heavy lifting for you today.
styleEdit.title: The Commitment
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What happens to your mood when you fully commit to a single aesthetic choice for the day?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Rub your hands together to create heat and hold them to your clothes.
styleEdit.description: Radiate energy with sunny vibes and warm-toned accessories because even if the sky is grey you can still bring the heat with layers that feel cosy and bright. Today is about embodying the energy of the sun so this is your chance to be the person who brightens the room just by walking into it.
styleEdit.title: The Warmth
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel warm inside and out?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Turn a garment inside out or inspect the lining to see how it was made.
styleEdit.description: Why follow the rules when you can just rewrite them? Shake things up by building your look in reverse. Start with the socks or shoes, then jump straight to the headwear or earrings, filling in the middle last. It’s a little chaotic, sure, but it stops you from reaching for the same old combos and helps you see your clothes with fresh eyes.
styleEdit.title: The Experiment
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: When was the last time you surprised yourself with an outfit?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Touch a piece of jewellery or clothing that was a gift and think of the giver.
styleEdit.description: Generosity is today’s theme so perhaps wear something that was given to you as a gift. It wraps you in the intention of the giver. Alternatively treat your outfit as a gift to the world by adding a flower or a beautiful colour that brightens someone else's day.
styleEdit.title: The Gift
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you wear the things people give you?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Do a little dance move or a wiggle as you put on your coat to inject joy into the fabric.
styleEdit.description: Bring a little extra joy to your day with your wardrobe. Break out festive textures like sequins, silk, or anything that shimmers. Why save the party pieces for the party when you can celebrate the good things in life by wearing your happiest clothes right now? A little sparkle for a coffee run is entirely appropriate.
styleEdit.title: The Celebration
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit feels like a celebration to wear?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Tie a knot or fasten a clasp with the intention of strengthening a bond.
styleEdit.description: Focus on the points of connection in your outfit such as where a top meets a trouser or where a sleeve meets a cuff. Ensure these transitions are smooth and intentional. Knotted details, ties, or clasps that bring two sides together symbolise unity. Celebrate the art of bringing things together.
styleEdit.title: The Connection
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which accessory helps pull your whole look together?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Point your toes directly towards your destination before taking the first step.
styleEdit.description: Subtlety is overrated when your outfit has a point to make so try sharp angles and defined shoulders to cut through any confusion. Look for clothing that creates a distinct V-shape or arrow-like form, creating a visual vector pointing exactly where you want to go. Directness is a brilliant style choice all on its own.
styleEdit.title: The Direct Approach
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe makes you feel the most assertive?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Check the label of your garment to see where in the world it travelled from.
styleEdit.description: Bring the outside in by mixing global influences and distinct textures. Attempt  eclectic pairings by combining the sharp structure of city tailoring with the relaxed ease of utility wear. The silhouette should feel boundless and heavily layered, suggesting you are ready to adapt to literally any environment. You are a citizen of the world so look like you are part of it.
styleEdit.title: The Traveler
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: How does your environment influence what you wear?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Set your gaze on the furthest point of the horizon before stepping out.
styleEdit.description: Let your outfit take on any strain the day may bring. A solid waistband or some supportive tailoring helps you stand tall even if you are just leaning against a wall checking your phone. Pick a highly visible silhouette that refuses to blend into the scenery and holds its own perfectly.
styleEdit.title: The Anticipation
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your posture match the quality of your outfit?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Point a finger decisively to practice giving direction.
styleEdit.description: Dress like you are calling the shots today by ensuring your silhouette is distinct; strong lines and a defined shape help you take up space. Ditch slouchy or vague fits in favour of intentional tailoring because you want to direct the eye exactly where it needs to go. You are the boss so dress like it.
styleEdit.title: The Director
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style command respect?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand perfectly still for a moment and imagine a line of light travelling up your spine.
styleEdit.description: Strip away the soft illusions of comfortable loungewear in favour of unyielding architecture. Look for fabrics that hold their own shape and resist collapsing such as thick cotton weaves or starched linens.Present the absolute reality of your form to the world with clean lines and clear intent.
styleEdit.title: The Truth
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style currently tell the truth about who you are?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Apply a scent to your pulse points to mark your own boundaries.
styleEdit.description: Choose an aesthetic that feels open rather than guarded today. Loosen the fit to let the air in. Focus on that easy, lived-in energy instead of pristine, untouchable perfection. You want a vibe that makes you feel the most comfortable in your own skin, while remaining totally in control of the situation.
styleEdit.title: The Exposure
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most vulnerable?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Adjust your collar and quickly scan the room from left to right.
styleEdit.description: Curiosity requires you to be quick on your feet today so keep your layers light and mobile. Opt for smooth, agile textures that allow you to pivot quickly. A high collar or structured neckline gives you somewhere to tuck your chin while you observe the room. You are basically gathering intel today so dress like the most stylish spy in the building.
styleEdit.title: The Observer
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to be seen or to see everything?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Check your reflection and see the best version of yourself looking back.
styleEdit.description: If you are chasing a dream, then dress for the vision. Wear an outfit that represents your highest ideal of yourself. It might be a little dressier than necessary but that is the whole point. Embodying your ideal self is the first step to becoming them.
styleEdit.title: The Idealist
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style reflect who you are or who you want to be?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Plant your feet wide and refuse to move for ten seconds.
styleEdit.description: Read the room and then do the absolute opposite. If the NPCs are wearing beige you are morally obligated to bring the clash. Choose a texture or print that utterly refuses to blend into the background. Standing out is the ultimate form of defence today so commit to the main character energy.
styleEdit.title: The Stand
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to fit in or to stand your ground?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Rub your hands together to generate heat and focus before touching your clothes.
styleEdit.description: Run the room by finding the exact sweet spot between soft and sharp. If you talk with your hands, make the sleeves the focal point by pushing them up or choosing a massive, oversized cuff. A subtle sheen can help guide the focus exactly where you want it.
styleEdit.title: The Conductor
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which piece of clothing highlights your hands or gestures the best?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Put on your shoes before you have fully decided where you are going.
styleEdit.description: Trust your first instinct and grab the first thing that catches your eye. There is a cool energy in spontaneous styling that overthinking completely kills. Throw on that jacket you bought on a whim or the shoes you usually save for "later." Later is now, so ride that wave of impulsive energy and see where it takes you.
styleEdit.title: The Impulse
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the most impulsive fashion purchase you actually wear?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Place a hand on your chest and take a deep breath to centre your heart space.
styleEdit.description: Vulnerability is a strength so consider an open neckline or a lighter, more breathable weave to symbolise letting people in. Soft, pastel tones or gentle neutrals can communicate a willingness to connect. Skip the dense padding or stiff collars that block communication. Dress with the softness you wish to receive from the world.
styleEdit.title: The Open Heart
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit invite connection or build a wall?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Polish a button or a piece of jewellery to ensure it shines for the arrival.
styleEdit.description: The vibe is "International Person of Mystery" even if you are just grabbing a coffee.
